issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://character.ai/chat/1GfkRJ2DXow98jGLO8tqoD8Dj7TB3-_OwMKe2sF-rrY?hist=cda9d136-2dde-4b22-90cd-f4ddca3aa56d](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcharacter.ai%2Fchat%2F1GfkRJ2DXow98jGLO8tqoD8Dj7TB3-_OwMKe2sF-rrY%3Fhist%3Dcda9d136-2dde-4b22-90cd-f4ddca3aa56d) ### Comment > The ad is gone but the snippet of it remains. Other ad pops up on the screen sometimes that i had tried to block manually but then my screen goes a little dark and i can't do anything but refresh. that ad requires one to press the 'x' or else it stays if the ad blocker is not on. ### Screenshots
